calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-23-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Gina Gonzales, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Petitioners: Dennis Jin Rui Fong and Huiling Guan, present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the Minor: Yongkang Fong, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Xiao Yan Lin, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Richard Yongkang Fong.
Decree signed in open court.
